calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Richard R. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Mark Himelstein, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Marilyn Castle, Trustee of the Marilyn Castle Revocable Trust.
No appearance by defendant Roberto Hecksher.
Judgment was entered against defendant Cynthia Heckscher on July 8, 2010 in Department 302.
Default was entered against defendant Roberto Hecksher on May 24, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 28, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 14, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Marilyn Castle, Trustee of the Marilyn Castle Revocable Trust, and against the Defaulted Defendant Roberto Hecksher as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - $669.00.
Punitive Damages - $450,000.00.
Costs - $365.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $501,034.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion To Enter Judgment Of Deft, Cynthia Heckscher (Ccp 1134, 579
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
E. Mark Himelstein (510.841.8575) appearing for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
PLAINTIFF MARILYN CASTLE, TRUSTEE OF THE MARILYN CASTLE'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT OF DEFENDANT, CYNTHIA HECKSCHER is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
